task.md.L2:
# Localization – Teacher Profile Selection (Hebrew and English Support)

### Category

feature - Feature functionality

### Feature Area

_No response_

### Scenario

User Story
As a user, I want the teacher selection interface and profiles to be presented in my preferred language (Hebrew or English) so that I can navigate the selection process comfortably regardless of which version of the website I am using.

Acceptance Criteria
Dynamic UI Translation: The system must detect the user's current site version. If the user is on the Hebrew version, all UI strings  must be displayed in Hebrew. If on the English version, show English equivalents.

Profile Content Localization:

Implement dual-language fields for teacher profiles (Bio, Specializations, and Titles).

The system must serve the content version that matches the user's active language setting. 

### Prototype Reference

_No response_

### Test Fixture

_No response_

### Site Behaviors

_No response_

### Design System Components

_No response_

### Additional Context

task.json.L0: Title: Localize teacher profile selection UI and content (Hebrew/English) | Type: feature | Risk: medium
task.json.L1:
- task_type: feature
- title: Localize teacher profile selection UI and content (Hebrew/English)
- description: Add Hebrew and English language support to teacher profile selection interface and profile content. Implement dual-language fields in TeacherProfiles collection (label, description), update API endpoints to serve localized content, and ensure UI dynamically displays content in the user's active language. Includes data migration for existing profiles.
- scope: [8 items] src/server/payload/collections/TeacherProfiles.ts, src/server/payload/seed/teacher-profiles-seed.ts, src/app/(frontend)/account/_components/TeachersProfileSection.tsx
- risk_level: medium
- questions: [3 items] Should existing teacher profiles be migrated to the new dual-language schema with translations, or should only new profiles use the localized fields?, How should the language be determined in the frontend—from the user's locale context, browser language, or explicit language switcher selection?, Should the Payload admin CMS display separate edit fields for Hebrew and English labels/descriptions, or manage them through a single interface?

  "task_type": "feature",
  "title": "Localize teacher profile selection UI and content (Hebrew/English)",
  "description": "Add Hebrew and English language support to teacher profile selection interface and profile content. Implement dual-language fields in TeacherProfiles collection (label, description), update API endpoints to serve localized content, and ensure UI dynamically displays content in the user's active language. Includes data migration for existing profiles.",
  "scope": [
    "src/server/payload/collections/TeacherProfiles.ts",
    "src/server/payload/seed/teacher-profiles-seed.ts",
    "src/app/(frontend)/account/_components/TeachersProfileSection.tsx",
    "src/app/(frontend)/onboarding/persona/PersonaSelectionStep.tsx",
    "src/app/api/teacher-profiles/route.ts",
    "src/app/api/user-settings/route.ts",
    "src/i18n/en.json",
    "src/i18n/he.json"
  ],
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "questions": [
    "Should existing teacher profiles be migrated to the new dual-language schema with translations, or should only new profiles use the localized fields?",
    "How should the language be determined in the frontend—from the user's locale context, browser language, or explicit language switcher selection?",
    "Should the Payload admin CMS display separate edit fields for Hebrew and English labels/descriptions, or manage them through a single interface?"
  ]
}
